cadence.description: How often the climate scan runs. Options: weekly, monthly, manual.

auto_heal_allowlist.description: Auto-heal applies only to safe, mechanical fixes. Structural changes (new skills, new phases, permission changes) always require human triage.

items.summary: skill card or prose reference references a missing file target that does not resolve to an existing path
runtime-event kind defined in payload_contracts but claimed by no actor, or in may_emit but never defined
